variants.name: 焰碎者
variants.ability: 当与你相同阵营的一名玩家成为一条咒语的目标时，施法者可能会死亡。
variants.firstNightReminder: If any cast Spells targeted "the pyroclast", or a player of alignament of the Pyroclast player's, place the "Targeted" token on the caster. You can kill any player who has the "Targeted" token. If so, replace said token with the "Dead" token.
variants.otherNightReminder: If any cast Spells targeted "the pyroclast", or a player of alignament of the Pyroclast player's, place the "Targeted" token on the caster. You can kill any player who has the "Targeted" token. If so, replace said token with the "Dead" token.
